title: Barani Barani Lyrics Pudhu Nellu Pudhu Naathu
stanzas:
Barani Barani Song Lyrics From Pudhu Nellu Pudhu Naathu
Singer / Music: Ilaiyaraaja

Anbu neera paachu
Idhu arumaiyaana thottam.
Azhugai polappum pochu
Ini anugidaadhu vaattam

Siriya kuruvi pottadhu
Oru poondhottame.
Siruga siruga nadathudhu
Nalla thaerottame.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Barani Barani'?

The song 'Barani Barani' conveys themes of beauty and nature, reflecting the simplicity and charm of rural life.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Pudhu Nellu Pudhu Naathu, this song is a celebration of life and nature, showcasing the protagonist's connection to their surroundings.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Ilaiyaraaja, who is also the music director, known for his exceptional compositions in Tamil cinema.

When was 'Barani Barani' released?

'Barani Barani' was released on March 15, 1991, and has since become a beloved classic.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Barani Barani' from the movie Pudhu Nellu Pudhu Naathu is a beautiful melody that evokes feelings of nostalgia and tranquility. It paints a vivid picture of nature's beauty and the simplicity of rural life, resonating deeply with listeners. The soothing voice of Ilaiyaraaja adds to the song's charm, making it a timeless classic. This song not only showcases the musical brilliance of its composer but also captures the essence of the emotions tied to the scenes it accompanies.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Barani Barani from Pudhu Nellu Pudhu Naathu is a timeless melody that captures the essence of nostalgia and beauty. With the enchanting voice of Ilaiyaraaja, this song takes listeners on a journey through its soothing rhythms and heartfelt lyrics. Experience the magic of this classic that continues to resonate with audiences even today.
stanzaMeanings: Barani Barani is a song sung by Thaamira Barani.
This land is coming to sing with a purpose, Barani.
Stand tall, the land is beautiful, sing beautifully, oh beloved..
Wake up, it's a good time.
